title: OPTIMA DSS for Alternaria detection in carrots
subtitle: OPTIMA DSS για ανίχνευση Αλτερνάριας σε καρότα
description: A freely accessible decision support system (DSS) providing 5-day risk predictions of Alternaria leaf blight in carrots based on meteorological data. It helps producers optimize spraying schedules, reduce pesticide use, and mitigate crop losses by offering risk maps in multiple European regions.
